functions.definitional_note: Meridian counts all consultants including contractors. Cascadia counts W-2 delivery staff only — COFA conflict.
Meridian reports Sales separately. Cascadia bundles Sales & Marketing — COFA conflict.
Meridian reports Marketing separately. Cascadia bundles into Sales & Marketing.
Cascadia bundles S&M into one department. Meridian separates them — COFA conflict.
Meridian includes finance contractors in headcount. Cascadia counts W-2 only.
Meridian HR manages both W-2 and contractor onboarding. Cascadia HR is W-2 only.
Meridian IT includes managed service provider staff. Cascadia IT is internal only.
Cascadia has dedicated Operations department for delivery centers. Meridian folds ops into G&A.
Both count only internal legal staff. Neither includes outside counsel.
Meridian absorbs Operations into G&A. Cascadia reports Operations separately.
